channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇱🇹🇺🇸 US Troop Presence in Lithuania Under Review as Defense Minister Questions Commitment
item.description: Lithuanian Defense Minister Robertas Kaunas said the next scheduled US troop deployment remains under review amid changing US force posture in Europe, raising concerns about regional security commitments.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇮🇱 France Restricts Israeli Presence at Europes Biggest Defense Show Amid Lebanon Tensions
item.description: France imposed restrictions on Israeli participation at Eurosatory defense exhibition, the largest in Europe, amid strained relations over Israels military operations in Lebanon.

item.title: 🇰🇼🇮🇷 Kuwait Airport Hit by Iranian Attack One Killed Dozens Wounded
item.description: Kuwait reported one person killed and 63 injured after Iranian drone and missile attack damaged airport facilities, forcing flight suspensions amid escalating US-Iran tensions in the Gulf.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇱 Trump Called Netanyahu Fucking Crazy in Heated Lebanon Phone Call
item.description: US President Donald Trump confirmed he called Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "fucking crazy" during a heated phone conversation over Lebanon policy, exposing growing strain between the allies.

item.title: 🇳🇴🇫🇷 Norway Joins French Nuclear Deterrence Program as Trust in US Falters
item.description: Norway became the ninth country to sign up for French nuclear deterrence consultations, reflecting growing European concerns about reliability of US security commitments amid geopolitical shifts.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Strikes Kuwait Airport as US Hits Qeshm Island in Latest Escalation
item.description: Iranian drones attacked Kuwait International Airport killing one person, while US forces struck Irans Qeshm Island facility. The escalation comes as diplomatic efforts between Washington and Tehran show little progress.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes St Petersburg During Putin Economic Forum
item.description: Ukrainian drones targeted energy and military sites in St Petersburg on the opening day of Russias flagship economic forum. Zelenskyy said Ukraine hit a navy base and oil terminal near Russias second-largest city.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Far-Right Praise for Shahs Secret Police Puts Reza Pahlavi in Difficult Position
item.description: The son of Irans deposed shah is being forced to distance himself from the once-dreaded Savak secret police as some of his supporters glorify it. The issue highlights tensions within Irans opposition movement.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cubas Medical Diplomacy Faces Setback as Latin American Countries Cut Ties
item.description: Several Latin American nations are ending agreements with Cubas medical program, which has been the countrys most significant soft power export. The moves reflect shifting political dynamics in the region.

item.title: ⚛️ The Mystery of Irans Highly Enriched Uranium Stockpile
item.description: The fate of Irans nuclear stockpile is among the biggest uncertainties surrounding potential peace talks. The interactive analysis examines where Irans enriched uranium might be stored.

item.title: 🇮🇳🔥 Foreign Nationals Among 21 Killed in Delhi Hospital Fire
item.description: A devastating fire at a hospital in Delhi killed at least 21 people, including foreign nationals who had traveled to India for medical treatment. The fire broke out in a commercial building housing medical facilities.

item.title: 🇹🇳⚖️ Tunisian Opposition Leader Sentenced to Life in Prison
item.description: Tunisian court sentenced Ennahdha leader Rached Ghannouchi to life in prison for 'forming a terrorist alliance.' Dozens of other defendants received lengthy prison terms in a major crackdown on opposition figures.

item.title: 🇮🇩🍽️ Indonesia Fires Free Meals Scheme Head After Poisonings
item.description: Indonesia's President Prabowo dismissed the head of the government's flagship free meals program after tens of thousands of school children fell ill from food poisonings. The program was a centerpiece of Prabowo's administration.

item.title: 🇺🇦✈️ Ukrainian Mirage 2000s spotted flying air-to-ground strike missions
item.description: A low-level flight profile followed by a steep climb suggests French-supplied Mirage 2000s are now conducting ground-attack operations, expanding their combat role beyond air defense.

item.title: 🇷🇺🤖 Russian trucks receive dazzle paint to confuse AI-powered drones
item.description: Russian forces are applying disruptive paint schemes to military vehicles designed to confuse machine-vision targeting systems as autonomous drones become an increasing threat on the battlefield.

item.title: 🇹🇷📡 Turkey's secretive HAVA SOJ electronic warfare jet appears in new imagery
item.description: The long-delayed Turkish Air Force electronic warfare aircraft, designed to blind enemy air defenses from outside contested airspace, has been spotted in new imagery, signaling progress on the indigenous program.

item.title: 🔫🇺🇸 SOCOM seeks new flyweight machine guns and rifles for special operations
item.description: U.S. Special Operations Command is searching for a new 5.56mm flyweight assault machine gun to replace lightweight M249 variants, as part of a broader push to modernize small arms for special forces.

item.title: 🇺🇸🤖 MQ-28 Ghost Bat drone now flying over Pacific from U.S. Navy base
item.description: Boeing's Australian-born MQ-28 Ghost Bat autonomous combat drone is conducting test flights from a U.S. Navy base in California, demonstrating maturity and promoting potential Pentagon sales.

item.title: 🇳🇬🛢️ Shell Continued Operating Polluting Pipeline in Nigeria Despite Knowing Environmental Damage
item.description: Documents reveal Shell pumped oil through a Nigerian pipeline for years despite evidence of pollution, according to a BBC investigation. The oil giant says the documents ignore the complex operating context.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ Trump Administration Abandons $1.8 Billion Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche announced the fund will be eliminated amid pushback from Republican lawmakers. The fund was designed to counter foreign influence operations.

item.title: 🇬🇭⚖️ Ghana Passes Sweeping Law Criminalizing LGBTQ Activity
item.description: Community groups report people are panicking as Ghana enacts broad legislation criminalizing LGBTQ activity. The new law significantly expands existing restrictions.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇨🇳🌏 India Develops Great Nicobar Island as Strategic Chokepoint Against China
item.description: Far from the Indian mainland, the government is investing billions in a controversial development project on Great Nicobar Island that could serve as a Hormuz-like chokepoint against Chinese shipping.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israel Strikes Southern Lebanon Despite Partial Hezbollah Truce
item.description: Israel continues military operations in southern Lebanon though a partial ceasefire brokered by the US appears to be holding in Beirut. The conflict enters its third month with no clear diplomatic resolution in sight.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Seven Civilians Killed as Drone Strikes Bus in Russia-Controlled Ukraine
item.description: A bus traveling between Moscow and Simferopol in Russian-occupied Crimea was hit by a drone attack, killing seven people. The incident underscores the ongoing dangers to civilian infrastructure on both sides of the conflict.

item.title: ☢️ US May Place Nuclear Weapons in Poland or Baltic States, Report Says
item.description: The US is considering expanding nuclear hosting arrangements in Eastern Europe as trust in American security guarantees wavers, though officials stress no agreement is imminent.
